script:
set +e
SP_OBJECT_ID="2f632469-51f6-4daf-a718-f3b161cf3cbf"
VM_SCOPE="/subscriptions/15a60cd5-8766-431b-a003-49f4f1b1890f/resourceGroups/SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/openclaw-vm"
echo "== logging in with VM managed identity =="
sudo -u azureuser bash -c 'az login --identity --allow-no-subscriptions 2>&1' | tail -5
echo
echo "== try direct role assignment =="
sudo -u azureuser az role assignment create --role "Virtual Machine Contributor" --assignee-object-id "$SP_OBJECT_ID" --assignee-principal-type ServicePrincipal --scope "$VM_SCOPE" 2>&1 | tail -15
echo
echo "== verify =="
sudo -u azureuser az role assignment list --assignee "$SP_OBJECT_ID" --scope "$VM_SCOPE" --query "[].roleDefinitionName" -o tsv 2>&1
